icloud.lahde: HAVAINTO: support.apple.com/guide/certifications/apple-internet-services-security -sivun listalla iCloud mainitaan yhtenä Applen ISO/IEC-sertifioinneilla katettuna internetpalveluna: 'Standardien ISO/IEC 27001 ja ISO/IEC 27018 kattamat Applen palvelut... iCloud... Osoitukset Applen ISO/IEC 27001- ja 27018-sertifioinneista ovat julkisesti saatavilla.'

protondrive.lahde: HAVAINTO: proton.me/drive/security -sivulla: 'Proton Drive has been audited by Securitum, a leading European security auditor. We always publish these audit reports so you can see a professional third-party evaluation of our apps.'

internxt.lahde: HAVAINTO: internxt.com/security -sivulla: 'Internxt has been independently audited and verified by Europe's leading penetration testing company, Securitum.'

dropbox.lahde: HAVAINTO: dropbox.com/features/security -sivulla kohdassa Compliance: 'SOC 1, 2, and 3 compliance reports — when you have high volumes of sensitive data in the cloud, you require superior security, privacy, and compliance controls— and regular reports on their effectiveness.'

onedrive.lahde: HAVAINTO: learn.microsoft.com/en-us/compliance/regulatory/offering-soc-2 -sivun In-scope services -listalla (Commercial): '...Office Online, Office Services Infrastructure, OneDrive, Planner...' eli OneDrive kuuluu Microsoftin SOC 2 Type 2 -auditoinnin piiriin.
